title: I Release the Need for Chaos and Allow Stable Peace
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the pattern of equating stimulation with safety
excerpt: A short energy statement for when the nervous system resists sustained calm. When quiet feels threatening, when routine feels dull, or when the body keeps seeking the next stimulation or problem to solve. The release names that pattern; the allow names stable peace as the safe alternative.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 28 theme of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive to Fall Asleep Faster and Wake Energised (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798269649795). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement for the pattern of treating stimulation as safety. The nervous system that learned early that quiet means something bad is coming. It keeps making drama or motion to stay alert. The release names that learned pattern directly. The allow points toward stable peace as the actual safe state.
I am ready to release the learned pattern of needing stimulation or chaos to feel safe and alive. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow stable, predictable peace as my safe foundation, the ground from which I grow. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 28 theme of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
